'''Sorrus''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Sorrus system/Legends|Sorrus system]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Its terrain consisted of [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] ranges and large [[Desert/Legends|deserts]]. The planet also had many sprawling cities. It had three capitals, one of which was [[Yinn La Hi]]. The [[Sorrusian]] people were [[Speciesism|xenophobic]], and known for being unfriendly to outsiders. [[Jenna Zan Arbor]] once had her scientific lab located on Sorrus.

{{Planet-stub}}
